description: This file controls the grid sizes of the inventory slots for the game's various UI windows. Any column field name starting with "*" is considered a comment field and is not used by the game.
source: Colonnes du .txt (BKVince 3.2) ; types/descriptions du guide TXT eezstreet-d2rdoc.

columns.name: class
columns.description: This is a reference field to define the type of inventory screen

columns.name: invLeft
columns.description: Starting X coordinate pixel position of the inventory panel

columns.name: invRight
columns.description: Ending X coordinate pixel position of the inventory panel (Includes the .invLeft value with the inventory width size)

columns.name: invTop
columns.description: Starting Y coordinate pixel position of the inventory panel

columns.name: invBottom
columns.description: Ending Y coordinate pixel position of the inventory panel (Includes the .invTop value with the inventory height size)

columns.name: gridX
columns.description: Column number size of the inventory grid, measured in the number of grid boxes to use

columns.name: gridY
columns.description: Column row size of the inventory grid, measured in the number of grid boxes to use

columns.name: gridLeft
columns.description: Starting X coordinate location of the inventory's left grid side

columns.name: gridRight
columns.description: Ending X coordinate location of the inventory's right grid side (Includes the .gridLeft value with the grid width size)

columns.name: gridTop
columns.description: Starting Y coordinate location of the inventory's top grid side

columns.name: gridBottom
columns.description: Ending Y coordinate location of the inventory's bottom grid side (Includes the .gridTop value with the grid height size)

columns.name: gridBoxWidth
columns.description: Width size of an inventory's box cell

columns.name: gridBoxHeight
columns.description: Height size of an inventory's box cell

columns.name: rArmLeft
columns.description: Starting X coordinate location of the associated slot

columns.name: rArmRight
columns.description: Ending X coordinate location of the associated slot (Includes the .Left value with the .Width value)

columns.name: rArmTop
columns.description: Starting Y coordinate location of the associated slot

columns.name: rArmBottom
columns.description: Ending Y coordinate location of the associated slot (Includes the .Top value with the .Height value)

columns.name: rArmWidth
columns.description: The pixel width of the associated slot

columns.name: rArmHeight
columns.description: The pixel Height of the associated slot
